title: Is it possible to pull data from jira server and create dashboards in monday.com
excerpt: Is it possible to pull data from jira server and create dashboards in monday.com

posts.author: shyam (shyam)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to pull data from jira server and create dashboards in monday.com

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. We use monday integrations to bring JIRA data into monday boards.
